name: devops
description: IaC + self-service governance team-in-a-box: 11 agents. An intake-refiner gates any input — story, requirements doc, or whole project — extracting testable requirements without inventing them; the manager auto-routes by input shape; the story-implementer decomposes a project into ordered stories then plans and builds each; a debugger fixes failures; code/architecture/network/security reviewers, a red team, a consumer-reviewer (self-service ADR usability + decision quality), and an ADR-amender that opens amendment PRs when an ADR is wrong guard changes; the manager also orchestrates review in optional agent-teams mode, breaks deadlocks, and summarizes. One-command loop via /ship, risk-tier decided once and persisted, deterministic hooks (AWS write-whitelist, protected paths behind review reports) plus opt-in team-lifecycle gates, audited auditors, and an anti-kafka charter. Standalone commands unchanged; /ship and team mode are additive. Per-project config: .governance.json.
